arts.ttl: Aston Villa predicted XI vs Wycombe Wanderers as seven changes tipped
arts.sum: Unai Emery will make changes to his side for Aston Villa's Carabao Cup third round clash with Wycombe Wanderers at Adams Park on Tuesday night (8pm). Predicted Villa XI: Gauci, Nedeljkovic, Carlos, Torres, Maatsen, Onana, Barkley, Bailey, Ramsey, Buendia, Duran.

arts.ttl: Ian Maatsen lifts lid on 'difficult' situation and makes Aston Villa vow
arts.sum: The crowd kept supporting us and when you come to Villa Park it’s such an amazing atmosphere. Lucas Digne, who has been keeping Maatsen out the side with his strong performances, was taken off at half-time against Wolves, allowing the Dutch international to play the whole of the second half at Villa Park.
